codeReview.summary: This fix correctly replaces negative-epsilon monotonic comparison with storage-precision normalization in BackfillCursorStore, but it does not resolve the original review's remaining blocking runtime-coverage issues tied to UsageAggregator.refreshAll/runScheduledBackfillIfNeeded execution paths.

issues.description: At the reviewed fix commit, `test_backfillGuard_persistenceFailure_preventsCursorAdvance` still validates behavior by directly calling `BackfillCursorStore.advanceCursor` instead of exercising `UsageAggregator.refreshAll()` persistence-failure runtime flow, so the original blocking requirement for explicit refreshAll guard-path execution evidence remains unmet.

At the reviewed fix commit, `test_backfillGuard_persistenceSuccess_allowsCursorAdvance` still bypasses `UsageAggregator.refreshAll()`/`runScheduledBackfillIfNeeded()` and therefore does not provide the required runtime success-path execution proof from the prior failed review.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker set `skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true`, but transcript evidence does not show reads of all required token-accounting-worker context files.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: token-accounting-worker step 1 requires reading `mission.md`, `AGENTS.md`, `.factory/library/architecture.md`, and `.factory/library/user-testing.md`. Transcript skeleton for session `cd8c620b-9247-4f8c-9f43-75aae84ec518` includes mission/validation/features/AGENTS/services reads, but no `.factory/library/architecture.md` or `.factory/library/user-testing.md` reads.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared library guidance remains misaligned with this backfill/token-accounting mission area.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md and .factory/library/user-testing.md are still switcher-centric (browser/CLI account-switcher flows) rather than backfill/reconciliation/token-accounting architecture/testing guidance.

summary: Fail: the storage-precision monotonic comparison fix is implemented, but this rerun does not close the prior blocking runtime-coverage gaps for refreshAll guard-path execution proof.
